primary_function: Toolkit for styling artifacts with a theme. These artifacts can be slides, docs, reportings, HTML landing pages, etc. There are 10 pre-set themes with colors/fonts that you can apply to any artifact that has been creating, or can generate a new theme on-the-fly.

authoritative: Color palette design and hex code specification
Font pairing for headers and body text

suggested_aec_gates: Verify theme showcase is displayed without modifications
Confirm explicit theme selection is obtained before application
Validate applied colors match the selected theme's hex codes exactly
Ensure font pairings are applied consistently for headers and body text
Verify proper contrast and readability are maintained
Confirm visual identity is consistent across all slides
Validate custom themes follow the established naming and structure pattern
Ensure theme application waits for user confirmation
Verify theme files are read from the correct themes/ directory
trigger_text: Toolkit for styling artifacts with a theme. These artifacts can be slides, docs, reportings, HTML landing pages, etc. There are 10 pre-set themes with colors/fonts that you can apply to any artifact that has been creating, or can generate a new theme on-the-fly.
